_notes: BRICS membership as of May 2026: 10 member states.
- Founding 5 (BRIC, then BRICS): Brazil, Russia, India, China; South Africa joined 2010.
- 2024 expansion: Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, UAE joined 1 January 2024.
- Saudi Arabia was invited in 2023 but its full membership status remains unclear; not included.
- Argentina was invited in 2023 but withdrew before joining; not included.
Schema v2 (2026-05-10): adds mission, headquarters, websiteUrl, wikipediaUrl for the layer-panel info popover. BRICS has no fixed headquarters — leadership rotates annually among members.
Update procedure: edit the members list and bump _generated.
name: BRICS
mission: Bloc of major emerging-economy states coordinating on trade, finance, and political alignment as a counterweight to Western-led institutions; operates the New Development Bank.
